Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts a group of "recipe rut" moms.
Video.title: Vinaigrettes Aren't Just for Salads

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Image.alt: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: Did you know that Louisiana is the country's biggest producer of blue crabs? Celebrate the blue crab with Emeril's crab and corn fritters, chilled avocado soup with crab relish, and crabmeat stuffed trout with vodka butter sauce.
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Emeril and Voodoo priestesses Brandi and Maggie celebrate New Orleans' annual Voodoo Fest.
Video.title: with Mambo Brandi, Mambo Maggie

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack: sea beans!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril makes the most of figs: Goat Cheese Tart with Prosciutto and Port-Macerated Figs; Seared Duck Breasts with Spiced Fig Jam; Bucatini with Figs and Gorgonzola Sauce.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: Inspired by saffron grown right here in the states, Emeril serves up his famous lobster with pappardelle and saffron cream sauce, seafood paella, and saffron olive oil cake.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: with Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: Inspired by Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite pecan recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Win over everyone with Emeril's easy crab dishes.
Video.title: Baltimore Ravens

Video.summary: For your next get together, punch up the menu with Emeril's coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: Basic Risotto, Risotto Cakes
Video.title: Risotto

Video.summary: Treat guests to Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp? Emeril presents two delicious recipes.
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: Nothing says Washington, D.C., like Emeril's crispy chicken wings with mumbo sauce.
Video.title: Washington Commanders

Video.summary: For a Tampa Bay style tailgate, treat your guests to Emeril's grilled fish with coconut rice.
Video.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers

Video.summary: For a Seattle style tailgate, Emeril whips up his crowd-pleasing cedar planked salmon.
Video.title: Seattle Seahawks

Video.summary: Pear Tart with Caramel Sauce, Upside-Down Spinach Tart, Bananas Foster Tart
Video.title: Tarts

Video.summary: Basic Pizza Dough, Portuguese Pizza, Lobster Pizza
Video.title: Creative Pizza

Video.summary: Quesadilla Tortilla, Pico De Gallo, Mini Tacos
Video.title: Tortillas

Video.summary: Chocolate French Toast, Norman's Down Under French Toast
Video.title: French Toast

Video.summary: Stir-Fry with Chicken Breasts and Spaghetti Squash, Peppered Flounder with Herbed Spaghetti Squash
Video.title: Spaghetti Squash

Video.summary: Corn Cakes, Scallops with Andouille Crust Gratin
Video.title: Starters at Emeril's

Video.summary: Grilled Fish with Root Slaw, Crispy Whole Fried Fish, Bacon Potato Salad
Video.title: Whole Little Fish

Video.summary: Southwest Cheese Tart, Pico de Gallo, Pecan Pancakes with Boar Sausage
Video.title: Breakfast

Video.summary: Emeril shares his show stopping desserts: white chocolate pots de creme, easy sweet peach upside-down cake, and poached pears with port wine syrup topped with crumbled blue cheese
Video.title: Do-Ahead Desserts

Video.summary: Make delicious Asian dishes with Emeril's recipes: chicken and veggie stir-fry with cellophane noodles, beef and soba noodle stir-fry, and cold-noodle salad with honey-sesame dressing and peanuts
Video.title: Asian Noodles

Video.summary: Emeril's brunch will feed a bunch! Cheesy country ham omelet, followed by warm popovers with creamy Creole shrimp, Prosecco and orange sorbet with Cointreau cocktail
Video.title: Come on Over for Brunch

Video.summary: Coconut Tempura Shrimp with Mango Chutney, Pineapple Cream Pie with Coconut Crust, Deep-Fried Mahi-Mahi, Macadamia Nut Fingers
Video.title: Emeril's Tropical Fruit Stand

Video.summary: Chocolate-Dipped Gooseberries, Peaches and Cream Jelly Roll, Deep-Dish Mixed Berry Pie
Video.title: Summertime Desserts

Video.summary: BBQ Salmon Gravlax with Warm Potato Salad, Coho Salmon en Papillote, Warm Smoked Salmon Salad
Video.title: Salute to Salmon

Video.summary: Baked Stuffed Lobster, Caribbean Lobster Stew with Spicy Fritters, Cold Lobster and Vanilla Bean Salad over Fresh Mache, Emeril's Lobster Cheesecake
Video.title: Emeril's Lobster Fest

Video.summary: Pickled Beets, Marble Rye, Beef Pastrami, Homemade Thousand Island Spread, Emeril's Open-Face Reuben
Video.title: Emeril's Deli

Video.summary: Creole Chicken, Red Beans and Rice Soup, Shrimp Court Bouillon, Roasted Flounder Stuffed with Eggplant and Cornbread Dressing, Sauce Piquant
Video.title: Creole Lite
